pi_items.source: Task description in task.json explicitly instructs the agent to change the singular label for Accounts to 'Household'. This target is strictly checked in the export script and verifier.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the CRM environment is populated with synthetically generated data via a local setup script (seed_data.php) containing hardcoded mock records for major companies. Verified all expected target CRM module labels against the task description and verifier logic, confirming that Accounts should be renamed to Household/Households and Opportunities to Investment/Investments.
